common.tagline: Privacy-first link shortener on the edge

landing.title: Short links with geo, device & analytics built in
landing.subtitle: Create short links that route by country and device, gate behind a password, and stream every click into Analytics Engine — all on the edge with zero cold-start lookups.

geo.title: Geo & device routing
geo.desc: Send visitors to different destinations by country or by Apple / Android device.

analytics.title: Edge analytics
analytics.desc: Every redirect is logged to Analytics Engine with geo, UA and referer dimensions.

privacy.title: Password & safety gates
privacy.desc: Protect links with a password or show an interstitial warning for unsafe destinations.

login.title: Sign in to Sink
login.description: Enter the site token to access the dashboard.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage your short links and view analytics.

overview.comingSoon: Link management and analytics arrive in the next phase.
